notes: Core mechanics mostly work (enemies enter, dive, fire, player can shoot and die) but the stage-clear condition logic is buggy and the capture sequence is incomplete/janky; visuals use colored rectangles instead of recognizable Galaga sprites, lacking the iconic look.

An incredibly impressive and feature-complete Galaga clone, including the tractor beam, ship capture, and dual-fighter rescue mechanics, though the grid enemies fire a bit too frequently making it slightly bullet-hellish.

This is a competent Galaga-inspired shooter with working movement, shooting, formations, dives, scoring, lives, and a capture mechanic, but it is not close to authentic Galaga and has design/logic rough edges like simplified visuals, odd stage-clear logic, limited firing behavior, and imperfect capture/dual-fighter implementation.
